label: Baseline Epsilon
observations: Baseline epsilon schedule; steady improvement — good reference point.

label: High Eps End
observations: "High eps_end (0.1): stays more exploratory late; noisier policy

label: Low Eps End
observations: Low eps_end (0.01): exploits more at end; cleaner late-game policy.

label: Short Decay
observations: Short decay (50k): switches to exploitation early; gains speed but misses exploration.

label: Long Decay
observations: Long decay (140k): explores almost the whole run; slower but broader search.

label: Low Eps Start
observations: Low eps_start (0.5): half as much early exploration; slightly under-explores.

label: Very Low Eps End + Long Decay
observations: Very low eps_end + long decay: maximises exploitation late; best greedy performance.

label: Fast Decay + Low Eps End
observations: Fast decay + low eps_end: aggressive exploitation switch; moderate reward.

label: Very Short Decay
observations: Very short decay (30k): exploits way too early; agent locked into suboptimal policy.

label: Near-Greedy From Start
observations: Near-greedy from start (eps_s=0.1): minimal exploration; lowest reward due to poor Q init.
